title: NoteBlockMusicPlayer
body:
NoteBlockMusicPlayer is a plugin for playback of nbs songs developed by the maintainer of [NoteBlockAPI](https://modrinth.com/plugin/noteblockapi).

# Main Features

* Radio for all players on server / in specific world / at specific position (only one server radio and only one world radio per world can be enabled at the same time).
* Configurable hologram at the position radio's location (requires Holographic Displays and ProtocolLib)
* ActionBar message
* Configurable pause between songs
* Limit player's access to radio using permissions
* Localizable

# Dependecies

* [NoteBlockAPI](https://modrinth.com/plugin/noteblockapi) (1.6.0 or newer)
* [DecentHolograms](https://modrinth.com/plugin/decentholograms) (optional)
* [Holographic Displays](https://dev.bukkit.org/projects/holographic-displays) and [ProtocolLib](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocollib.1997/) (optional, ProtocolLib required for permission-based holograms)
* [PlaceholderAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/) (optional)

# Installation

1. Put NoteBlockMusicPlayer's, NoteBlockAPI's and optionaly Holographic Displays's and ProtocolLib's jar files to your server's `/plugins` directory.
2. Restart the server
3. Put your .nbs files to `/plugins/NoteBlockMusicPlayer/songs` directory
4. Add your songs to playlist in generated `playlist.yml` file
5. Setup some Server/World/PositionRadio in `globalradio.yml` or `positionradio.yml` file
6. Restart the server or use `/nbmp reload` and `/<server/world/position>radio reload` (depend on what type of radio have you set up)

List of all commands, permissions, config options and provided placeholders can be found [here](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/noteblockmusicplayer.37295/field?field=documentation).

# Builds

* **Release:** [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/plugin/noteblockmusicplayer), [SpigotMC](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/noteblockmusicplayer.37295/)
* **Development build:** [Jenkins](https://ci.haprosgames.com/job/NoteBlockMusicPlayer/)
